summary: Frontend-only QA pass on ExamVault marketing landing (https://trust-papers.preview.emergentagent.com/). All 15 test cases from review request PASSED. Hero title 'EXAMVAULT' renders on a single horizontal line across 320/360/375/390/412/430 viewports (measured DOM bounding rect: heights 39–45px, widths always ≤ viewport). No horizontal scrolling at 320px. Hero stat cards render as 2x2 grid on 375px (rows y=649 and y=741). CTAs stack vertically on mobile. Applicable-across strip, Vision section, comparison table and 'Prototype Status' disclaimer all present. All required meta tags present in dist/index.html (title, description, canonical=https://examvault-delta.vercel.app, robots=index,follow, og:image=https://examvault-delta.vercel.app/og-image.png with 1200x630, twitter:card=summary_large_image). Static /app/frontend/dist/og-image.png exists (136,718 bytes > 10KB). Nav CTA and hero CTA both navigate to /prototype. All 5 persona chips navigate to /candidate/register, /vault, /centre, /evaluator, /analytics respectively. Contact email/phone testIDs present with onPress -> Linking.openURL(mailto:aadilwaseem234@gmail.com) and (tel:+918920869628) verified in source (LINKS at index.tsx:26-27). Smoke: /prototype shows 5 role cards, /vault renders multi-sig session, /centre renders command banner without error, /verify/DEMO-CERT-1 renders verifier without error.
critical_code_review_comments: index.tsx is 997 lines — consider splitting hero/stats/vision/comparison/contact sections into separate components for maintainability (not blocking).

Contact email/phone Pressable does not render as <a href> in RN Web, so it is not crawlable/SEO-visible as a link — value strings are visible text and onPress calls Linking.openURL correctly. Acceptable for RN Web but note that right-click 'copy link' won't work.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Landing page hero fluid sizing (heroSize 34→76 based on width, letterSpacing 1.5→4) with numberOfLines=1 + adjustsFontSizeToFit fully resolves vertical wrap bug. Stats 2x2 flex-wrap works on mobile. Meta tags and og-image.png in dist verified. All prototype routes reachable.
rca_of_issue: Reported bug (hero vertical wrap on phones) already fixed. Verified via DOM bounding-rect measurement across 6 mobile viewports (320/360/375/390/412/430): height stays 39–45px and width ≤ viewport, confirming single-line render. Fix in /app/frontend/app/index.tsx:59 uses width-based heroSize step function combined with numberOfLines=1 and adjustsFontSizeToFit.
